variants: Sofia Costa currently resides in Riverstone Fold, where she is an employee of Umber Bell Shipping. Hailing from Foxspire Hamlet, she has established herself as a notable figure in the shipping industry. Sofia is the inventor of the Illuminated Ink Protocol, a groundbreaking approach to logging shipping details. Her valuable contributions were acknowledged when she received the Dawnspire Token, a significant honor recognizing her impact. Through her efforts at Umber Bell Shipping, Sofia continues to drive innovation and set new standards in her field.
